user_query: I am planning a road trip with my friends and we need a static map image of our route. The map should have a width of 800 pixels and a height of 600 pixels. The center of the map should be at latitude 37.7749 and longitude -122.4194, and the zoom level should be 10. Additionally, we would like to find nearby webcams along our route within a radius of 10 kilometers.

TaskList.description: Generate a static map image based on the specified parameters: center at latitude 37.7749 and longitude -122.4194, with a width of 800 pixels, height of 600 pixels, and zoom level of 10.
Find nearby webcams along the route within a radius of 10 kilometers from the center point.
